column1: They found the rare manuscript in the basement.

column2: The rare manuscript was found in the basement.

column1: I bought a book a week ago.

column2: The book was bought a week ago.

column1: The scientists are examining the new bacterium.

column2: A new bacterium is being examined by the scientists.

column1: An old lady found a box of jewellery last week.

column2: The box of jewellery was found by the old lady last week.
The book is often asked for.

column1: A distinguished surgeon will operate on my sister.

column2: My sister will be operated on by a distinguished surgeon.

column1: Tom has just told me a good story.

column2: A good story has just been told me by Tom.
The room has been tidied thoroughly.

column1: Bob and Jack were carrying our bags.

column2: Our bags were being carried by Bob and Jack.
